title: Finder: Your File Manager
drDigitalIntro: Finder is the app that shows all your files and folders. The list on the left side is called the sidebar — it has shortcuts to the important places on your Mac: Home, Documents, Pictures, Downloads, and Trash. Click any of them to jump straight there. Let's practice getting around.

playgroundTask.goal: Use the sidebar to move between places

steps.say: The sidebar on the left jumps between places. Click Pictures.
Now click Downloads to see what's saved there.
Click Home to return to your main files. That's how you get around in Finder!

drDigitalSuccess: You used the sidebar to visit Pictures, Downloads, and Home. That's how you navigate everywhere in Finder.
drDigitalHint: Single-click the glowing place in the sidebar on the left.
